title: Project Overclock
description: Made for my youtube series called Project Overclock. Channel name is SoyNylon I hope you enjoy this modpack.
body:
# ⚙️ Core Features
Project Overclock is a technical-adventure modpack centered around complex machinery and streamlined automation, featuring a curated list of quality-of-life and performance mods.

Server-Side Automation: Features Polyfactory—a powerful, Polymer-based tech mod that brings grinders, mixers, conveyors, and complex data transmission (cables, Nixie tubes) for deep automation without heavy client requirements.

Kinetic Engineering: Master the rotational mechanics of Create, designing functional trains, automated harvesting systems, and massive processing arrays.

Optimized Performance: Includes essential optimization and Quality-of-Life mods to ensure a smooth framerate and a clean inventory experience, even with hundreds of new blocks and items.

Deep Adventure: Seamlessly blends technology with a rich exploration experience, encouraging you to build complex supply chains across new, beautiful biomes.

# 🚀 Purpose of Modpack
This pack is built for players who love the process of engineering a solution. If you want a fresh Minecraft experience that challenges you to:

Build the Ultimate Factory: Create complex machines using Polyfactory and Create that feel integrated and challenging, without being overwhelmingly grindy.

Focus on the Fun: Spend less time troubleshooting and more time creating, thanks to included performance and QoL mods.

Follow the Series: Jump into the exact world being played in the Project Overclock YouTube se
